race.comment: THE EYES HAVE IT (5) gets a much better set-up for this third-up. Showed good early toe from the wide gate and gripped on late with a close-up second over 1100m here. Will prove hard to get past. WOLF ISLAND (11) doesn't win out of turn but has a good record at this course and distance. Shuffled back early from the inside gate and chipped away late with a handy fourth over 1280m at Canberra Acton. Place preferred. LADY GOT BLING (12) improving filly who got the job done first-up defeating an ordinary field over this track and trip. Nose roll goes on and will relish the fast tempo. Each-way. SIR LUNCHALOTS (9) big jump in class first-up when he covered ground for a fading fifteenth over 1200m at Rosehill Gardens in Highway class. Proven here and can race much closer on a firmer surface.
